project.description: Existing managed Compose project name. Omit when unknown.

service.description: New Compose service and destination directory name. Omit when unknown.

repo_url.description: Public GitHub HTTPS repository URL. Omit when unknown.

container_port.description: Optional advanced override. Framework presets default to port 3000.

host_port.description: Optional published host port; omit to allocate automatically

framework.description: Framework preset used to generate a Dockerfile, or existing to use the repository Dockerfile.

environment_names.description: Optional environment variable names only. Never include secret values.
